positive: Minimalist geometric fox head profile, rendered in stark black and white negative space design. The fox's silhouette is sharply defined against a clean, pure white background. Use bold, crisp line work and stylized geometric shapes to abstractly suggest the fox's form, integrating triangles and parallel lines. High contrast, graphic art style, suitable for screen printing on t-shirts. Studio lighting, vector art quality, symmetrical composition, centered subject.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, noisy, low resolution, text, watermark, signature, logo, gradient, color saturation, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy
